heading: CONSULTING SERVICES:__page_no__14
text: consulting services: id dr. chavez patient unable to provide significant history. sent over from custodial snf due to reported desaturation event. patient with chronic respiratory failure on 3 l o2 all the time. she reportedly was having some increased work of breathing and sent sent over for evaluation. noted to have leukocytosis as well as elevated lactate. initial ed evaluation without overt etiology being made apparent. empiric antibiotics initiated. patient had blood cultures with acinetobacter baumannii and wound cultures positive for esbl e. coli. patient was continued on meropenem and id consulted. patient was also placed on gentamicin briefly. patient remained stable tolerating feeding wound care was continued. patient was recommended total 14 days of iv invanz and discharge back to skilled nursing facility. patient remains vegetative bedbound and contracted with poor quality of life and discussed with patient's daughter who continues to have unrealistic expectations and patient remains full code
